channel.title: Parallel on Bazlur's Stream of Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in Parallel on Bazlur's Stream of Thoughts
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2021, A N M Bazlur Rahman

item.title: Turbocharging Java With Parallel Array Sorting
item.description: Sorting arrays in parallel is a JDK enhancement, which is part of the Java 9 release, which should yield significant performance improvements. JDK enhancement proposal 103 brings a new way of array sorting which uses the Fork/Join parallelism technique to provide sorting of arrays in parallel. This new feature has been added in the Java 8 release. Currently, we have two sorting implementations, one sorts arrays and another sorts collections. These two implementations perform sort in a single thread.
